content.body: Right. For Babel to match the stage 3 spec, please ensure that `version` is set to `2023-11`: https://babeljs.io/docs/babel-plugin-proposal-decorators#version. I believe there has not been any normative changes since then, but if you find any bugs, please report to Babel repo and we will fix it asap.
content.formatted_body: Right. For Babel to match the stage 3 spec, please ensure that version is set to 2023-11: https://babeljs.io/docs/babel-plugin-proposal-decorators#version. I believe there has not been any normative changes since then, but if you find any bugs, please report to Babel repo and we will fix it asap.
